name: Surprise Breakfast Puffers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients; set aside.
2. In a mixing bowl, cream together butter and honey. Add eggs one at a time until well blended.
3. Gradually stir in the next three ingredients; mix well.
4. Slowly add buttermilk.
5. Spoon 2 tablespoons batter into oiled muffin cups. Add 1 teaspoon orange filling and fill each cup about 2/3 full with batter.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for 20-25 minutes.
